title: Sai baba ji Chalisa
intro: Shri Sai Chalisa - Hymn to Sai Baba
description:
॥ Shri Shirdi Sai Baba Chalisa ॥

Pehle Sai ke charnon mein, apna sheesh namaun main.
Kaise Shirdi Sai aaye, saara haal sunaun main.

Kaun hain mata, pita kaun hain, yeh na kisi ne bhi jaana.
Kahan janam Sai ne dhara, prashn paheli raha bana.
Koi kahe Ayodhya ke ye, Ramchandra Bhagwan hain.
Koi kehta Saibaba, Pavan-putra Hanuman hain.
Koi kehta Mangal murti, Shri Gajanan hain Sai.
Koi kehta Gokul-mohan, Devki nandan hain Sai.
Shankar samajh bhakt kai toh, Baba ko bhajate rehte.
Koi kahe avatar Datt ka, puja Sai ki karte.
Kuch bhi mano unko tum, par Sai hain sachhe Bhagwan.
Bade dayalu, Deenbandhu, kitnon ko diya hai jeevan daan.
Kai varsh pehle ki ghatna, tumhein sunaunga main baat.
Kisi bhagyashali ki, Shirdi mein aayi thi baraat.
Aaya saath usi ke tha, balak ek bahut sundar.
Aaya, aakar vahin bas gaya, paavan Shirdi kiya nagar.
Kai dinon tak raha bhatakta, bhiksha mangi usne dar-dar.
Aur dikhayi aisi leela, jag mein jo ho gayi amar.
Jaise-jaise umar badhi, vaise hi badhti gayi shaan.
Ghar-ghar hone laga nagar mein, Sai Baba ka gungaan.
Dig-digant mein laga gunjne, phir toh Sai-ji ka naam.
Deen-dukhi ki raksha karna, yahi raha Baba ka kaam.
Baba ke charnon mein jakar, jo kehta main hoon nirdhan.
Daya usi par hoti unki, khul jaate dukh ke bandhan.
Kabhi kisi ne mangi bhiksha, do Baba mujhko santan.
Asthu tab kehkar Sai, dete the usko vardaan.
Swayam dukhi Baba ho jaate, deen-dukhi jan ka lakh haal.
Antah karan Shri Sai ka, saagar jaisa raha vishal.
Bhakt ek Madrasi aaya, ghar ka bahut bada dhanwaan.
Maal khazana behad uska, keval nahi rahi santan.
Laga manane Sai Nath ko, Baba mujh par daya karo.
Jhanjha se jhankrit naiya ko, tum hi meri paar karo.
Kuldipak ke abhav mein, vyarth hai daulat ki maya.
Aaj bhikhari ban kar Baba, sharan tumhari main aaya.
De do mujhko putra daan, main rini rahunga jeevan bhar.
Aur kisi ki aas na mujhko, sirf bharosa hai tum par.
Anunay-vinay bahut ki usne, charnon mein dhar ke sheesh.
Tab prasann hokar Baba ne, diya bhakt ko yeh aashish.
'Allah bhala karega tera', putra janm ho tere ghar.
Kripa hogi tum par uski, aur tere us balak par.
Ab tak nahi kisi ne paya, Sai ki kripa ka paar.
Putra ratna de Madrasi ko, dhanya kiya uska sansar.
Tan-man se jo bhaje usi ka, jag mein hota hai uddhar.
Saanch ko aanch nahi hai koi, sada jhooth ki hoti haar.
Main hoon sada sahare uske, sada rahunga uska daas.
Sai jaisa Prabhu mila hai, itni hi kam hai kya aas.
Mera bhi din tha ek aisa, milti nahi mujhe thi roti.
Tan par kapda door raha tha, shesh rahi nanhi si langoti.
Sarita sanmukh hone par bhi main pyasa ka pyasa tha.
Durdin mera mere upar, davagni barsata tha.
Dharti ke atirikt jagat mein, mera kuch avalamb na tha.
Bana bhikhari main duniya mein, dar-dar thokar khata tha.
Aise mein ek mitr mila jo, param bhakt Sai ka tha.
Janjalon se mukt magar is, jagati mein vah mujh-sa tha.
Baba ke darshan ki khatir, mil donon ne kiya vichar.
Sai jaise daya-murti ke, darshan ko ho gaye taiyar.
Paavan Shirdi nagari mein jakar, dekhi matwali murti.
Dhanya janm ho gaya ki humne, jab dekhi Sai ki surati.
Jabse kiye hain darshan humne, dukh saara kafoor ho gaya.
Sankat saare mite aur, vipadaon ka ant ho gaya.
Maan aur samman mila, bhiksha mein humko Baba se.
Pratibimbit ho uthe jagat mein, hum Sai ki aabha se.
Baba ne samman diya hai, maan diya is jeevan mein.
Iska hi sambal le main, hansta jaunga jeevan mein.
Sai ki leela ka mere, man par aisa asar hua.
Lagta jagati ke kan-kan mein, jaise ho vah bhara hua.
"Kashiram" Baba ka bhakt, is Shirdi mein rehta tha.
Main Sai ka Sai mera, vah duniya se kehta tha.
Sikar swayam vastra bechta, gram nagar bazaron mein.
Jhankrit uski hrid tantri thi, Sai ki jhankaron mein.
Stabdh nisha thi, the soye, rajni aanchal mein chand-sitare.
Nahi soojhta raha haath ko haath timir ke maare.
Vastra bechkar laut raha tha, haay! haat se "Kashi".
Vichitr bada sanyog ki us din, aata tha vah ekaki.
Gher raah mein khade ho gaye, use kutil, anyayi.
Maaro kaato looto is ki hi dhwani padi sunayi.
Loot peet kar use vahan se, kutil gaye champat ho.
Aaghaton se, marmahat ho, usne di sangya kho.
Bahut der tak pada raha vah, vahin usi halat mein.
Jaane kab kuch hosh ho utha, usko kisi palak mein.
Anjaane hi uske munh se, nikal pada tha Sai.
Jiski pratidhwani Shirdi mein, Baba ko padi sunayi.
Kshubdh utha ho maanas unka, Baba gaye vikal ho.
Lagta jaise ghatna saari, ghati unhi ke sammukh ho.
Unmadi se idhar-udhar, tab Baba lage bhatakne.
Sammukh cheezein jo bhi aayin, unko lage patakne.
Aur dhadhakte angaron mein, Baba ne apna kar dala.
Hue sashankit sabhi vahan, lakh tandav nritya nirala.
Samajh gaye sab log ki koi, bhakt pada sankat mein.
Kshubhit khade the sabhi vahan par, pade hue vismay mein.
Use bachane ke hi khatir, Baba aaj vikal hain.
Uski hi peeda se peedit, unka antahsthal hai.
Itne mein hi vidhi ne apni, vichitrata dikhlayi.
Lakh kar jisko janta ki, shraddha-sarita leharayi.
Le-kar kar sangyahin bhakt ko, gaadi ek vahan aayi.
Sammukh apne dekh bhakt ko, Sai ki aankhein bhar aayin.
Shaant, dheer, gambhir sindhu-sa, Baba ka antahsthal.
Aaj na jaane kyon reh-reh kar, ho jata tha chanchal.
Aaj daya ki murti swayam tha, bana hua upchari.
Aur bhakt ke liye aaj tha, dev bana pratihari.
Aaj bhakti ki visham pariksha mein, safal hua tha Kashi.
Uske hi darshan ke khatir, the umde nagar-nivasi.
Jab bhi aur jahan bhi koi, bhakt pade sankat mein.
Uski raksha karne Baba, aate hain palbhar mein.
Yug-yug ka hai satya yeh, nahi koi nayi kahani.
Aapatgrast bhakt jab hota, aate khud antaryami.
Bhed-bhav se pare pujari, manavta ke the Sai.
Jitne pyare Hindu-Muslim, utne hi the Sikh Isai.
Bhed-bhav mandir-masjid ka, tod-phod Baba ne dala.
Ram-Rahim sabhi unke the, Krishna-Karim-Allah-tala.
Ghante ki pratidhwani se goonja, masjid ka kona-kona.
Mile paraspar Hindu-Muslim, pyaar badha din-din doona.
Chamatkar tha kitna sundar, parichay is kaya ne di.
Aur neem kadwahat mein bhi, mithaas Baba ne bhar di.
Sabko sneh diya Sai ne, sabko santul pyaar kiya.
Jo kuch jisne bhi chaha, Baba ne unko vahi diya.
Aise sneh sheel bhajane ka, naam sada jo japa kare.
Parvat jaisa dukh na kyon ho, palbhar mein vah door tare.
Sai jaisa daata humne, are nahi dekha koi.
Jiske keval darshan se hi, saari vipada door ho gayi.
Tan mein Sai, man mein Sai, Sai-Sai bhaja karo.
Apne tan ki sudhi-budhi khokar, sudhi uski tum kiya karo.
Jab tu apni sudhi taj, Baba ki sudhi kiya karega.
Aur raat-din Baba, Baba hi tu rata karega.
Toh Baba ko are! vivash ho, sudhi teri leni hi hogi.
Teri har ichha Baba ko, poori hi karni hogi.
Jangal-jangal bhatak na pagal, aur dhoondhne Baba ko.
Ek jagah keval Shirdi mein, tu payega Baba ko.
Dhanya jagat mein prani hai vah, jisne Baba ko paya.
Dukh mein sukh mein prahar aath ho, Sai ka hi gun gaya.
Girein sankaton ke parvat, chahe bijli hi toot pade.
Sai ka le naam sada tum, sammukh sab ke raho ade.
Is budhe ki karamat sun, tum ho jaoge hairan.
Dang reh gaye sunkar jisko, jaane kitne chatur sujan.
Ek baar Shirdi mein sadhu, dhongi tha koi aaya.
Bholi-bhali nagar-nivasi, janta ko tha bharmaya.
Jadi-bootiyan unhein dikhakar, karne laga vahan bhashan.
Kehne laga suno shrotagan, ghar mera hai Vrindavan.
Aushadhi mere paas ek hai, aur ajab ismein shakti.
Iske sevan karne se hi, ho jaati dukh se mukti.
Agar mukt hona chaho tum, sankat se bimari se.
Toh hai mera namra nivedan, har nar se har nari se.
Lo kharid tum isko iski, sevan vidhiyan hain nyari.
Yadyapi tuchh vastu hai yeh, gun uske hain ati bhari.
Jo hai santati heen yahan yadi, meri aushadhi ko khayein.
Putra-ratna ho prapt, are vah munh manga phal payein.
Aushadhi meri jo na kharide, jeevan bhar pachhtayega.
Mujh jaisa prani shayad hi, are yahan aa payega.
Duniyan do din ka mela hai, mauj shauk tum bhi kar lo.
Gar isse milta hai, sab kuch, tum bhi isko le lo.
Hairani badhti janta ki, lakh iski karastani.
Pramudit vah bhi man hi man tha, lakh logo ki nadani.
Khabar sunane Baba ko yeh, gaya daudkar sevak ek.
Sunkar bhrikuti tani aur, vismaran ho gaya sabhi vivek.
Hukm diya sevak ko, satwar pakad dusht ko laao.
Ya Shirdi ki seema se, kapti ko door bhagao.
Mere rehte bholi-bhali, Shirdi ki janta ko.
Kaun neech aisa jo, saahas karta hai chhalne ko.
Pal bhar mein hi aise dhongi, kapti neech lutere ko.
Mahanash ke mahagart mein, pahuncha doon jeevan bhar ko.
Tanik mila aabhas madari kroor kutil anyayi ko.
Kaal nachta hai ab sir par, gussa aaya Sai ko.
Pal bhar mein sab khel band kar, bhaga sir par rakhkar pair.
Soch tha man hi man, bhagwan nahi hai ab khair.
Sach hai Sai jaisa daani, mil na sakega jag mein.
Ansh Ish ka Saibaba, unhein na kuch bhi mushkil jag mein.
Sneh, sheel, saujanya aadi ka, aabhushan dharan kar.
Badhta is duniya mein jo bhi, manav-seva ke path par.
Vahi jeet leta hai jagati ke, jan-jan ka antahsthal.
Uski ek udasi hi jag ko kar deti hai vihval.
Jab-jab jag mein bhaar paap ka, badh badh hi jata hai.
Use mitane ke hi khatir, avtari hi aata hai.
Paap aur anyay sabhi kuch, is jagati ka har ke.
Door bhaga deta duniya ke, danav ko kshan bhar mein.
Sneh sudha ki dhaar barasne, lagti hai is duniya mein.
Gale paraspar milne lagte, hain jan-jan aapas mein.
Aise hi avtari Sai, mrityulok mein aakar.
Samta ka yeh path padhaya, sabko apna aap mitakar.
Naam Dwarka masjid ka, rakkha Shirdi mein Sai ne.
Daap, taap, santap mitaya, jo kuch aaya Sai ne.
Sada yaad mein mast Ram ki, baithe rehte the Sai.
Prahar aath hi Ram naam ka, bhajate rehte the Sai.
Sookhi-rookhi, taji-baasi, chahe ya hove pakwan.
Sada pyaar ke bhookhe Sai ki, khatir the sabhi saman.
Sneh aur shraddha se apni, jan jo kuch de jaate the.
Bade chaav se us bhojan ko, Baba paavan karte the.
Kabhi-kabhi man behlane ko, Baba baag mein jaate the.
Pramudit man nirakh prakriti, chhata ko ve hote the.
Rang-birange pushp baag ke, mand-mand hil-dul karke.
Beehad veerane man mein bhi, sneh salil bhar jaate the.
Aisi sumadhur bela mein bhi, dukh aapat vipada ke maare.
Apne man ki vyatha sunane, jan rehte Baba ko ghere.
Sunkar jinki karun katha ko, nayan kamal bhar aate the.
De vibhuti har vyatha, shanti, unke ur mein bhar dete the.
Jaane kya adbhut, shakti, us vibhuti mein hoti thi.
Jo dharan karte mastak par, dukh saara har leti thi.
Dhanya manuj ve sakshat darshan, jo Baba Sai ke paaye.
Dhanya kamal-kar unke jinse, charan-kamal ve parsaye.
Kaash nirbhay tumko bhi, sakshat Sai mil jata.
Barson se ujada chaman apna, phir se aaj khil jata.
Gar pakadta main charan Shri ke, nahi chhodta umrbhar.
Mana leta main zaroor unko, gar roothte Sai mujh par.
meaning:
॥ Shri Shirdi Sai Baba Chalisa (English Transliteration & Meaning) ॥

Pehle Sai ke charnon mein, apna sheesh namaun main.
(First, I bow my head at the lotus feet of Sai.)
Kaise Shirdi Sai aaye, saara haal sunaun main.
(I will narrate the entire story of how Sai came to Shirdi.)

Kaun hain mata, pita kaun hain, yeh na kisi ne bhi jaana.
(Who is his mother and who is his father, no one has ever known.)
Kahan janam Sai ne dhara, prashn paheli raha bana.
(Where Sai was born, that question has remained a puzzle.)
Koi kahe Ayodhya ke ye, Ramchandra Bhagwan hain.
(Some say he is Lord Ramchandra of Ayodhya.)
Koi kehta Saibaba, Pavan-putra Hanuman hain.
(Some say Saibaba is the wind-god's son, Hanuman.)
Koi kehta Mangal murti, Shri Gajanan hain Sai.
(Some say Sai is the auspicious Lord Ganesha.)
Koi kehta Gokul-mohan, Devki nandan hain Sai.
(Some say Sai is the charmer of Gokul, the son of Devki, Krishna.)
Shankar samajh bhakt kai toh, Baba ko bhajate rehte.
(Many devotees worship Baba considering him to be Lord Shiva.)
Koi kahe avatar Datt ka, puja Sai ki karte.
(Some worship Sai considering him to be an incarnation of Lord Dattatreya.)
Kuch bhi mano unko tum, par Sai hain sachhe Bhagwan.
(Whatever you may believe him to be, Sai is the true God.)
Bade dayalu, Deenbandhu, kitnon ko diya hai jeevan daan.
(He is very compassionate, friend of the poor, and has given life to many.)

Kai varsh pehle ki ghatna, tumhein sunaunga main baat.
(I will tell you about an incident from many years ago.)
Kisi bhagyashali ki, Shirdi mein aayi thi baraat.
(A wedding procession of a lucky person had come to Shirdi.)
Aaya saath usi ke tha, balak ek bahut sundar.
(With it came a very beautiful boy.)
Aaya, aakar vahin bas gaya, paavan Shirdi kiya nagar.
(He came and settled there, making the holy town of Shirdi his abode.)
Kai dinon tak raha bhatakta, bhiksha mangi usne dar-dar.
(For many days he wandered, begging for alms from door to door.)
Aur dikhayi aisi leela, jag mein jo ho gayi amar.
(And he showed such miracles, which became immortal in the world.)

Jaise-jaise umar badhi, vaise hi badhti gayi shaan.
(As he grew older, his glory increased.)
Ghar-ghar hone laga nagar mein, Sai Baba ka gungaan.
(In every house in the town, Sai Baba's praises began to be sung.)
Dig-digant mein laga gunjne, phir toh Sai-ji ka naam.
(Then the name of Sai began to echo in all directions.)
Deen-dukhi ki raksha karna, yahi raha Baba ka kaam.
(Protecting the poor and suffering became Baba's only work.)

Baba ke charnon mein jakar, jo kehta main hoon nirdhan.
(Whoever goes to Baba's feet and says, "I am poor and needy".)
Daya usi par hoti unki, khul jaate dukh ke bandhan.
(He shows compassion upon them, and the chains of suffering are broken.)
Kabhi kisi ne mangi bhiksha, do Baba mujhko santan.
(Sometimes someone begged for alms, "Oh Baba, give me a child.")
Asthu tab kehkar Sai, dete the usko vardaan.
(Saying "So be it" [Asthu], Sai would give them the boon.)

Swayam dukhi Baba ho jaate, deen-dukhi jan ka lakh haal.
(Baba himself would become sad seeing the state of the poor and distressed.)
Antah karan Shri Sai ka, saagar jaisa raha vishal.
(The heart of Shri Sai was as vast as the ocean.)
Bhakt ek Madrasi aaya, ghar ka bahut bada dhanwaan.
(A devotee from Madras came, very wealthy and rich.)
Maal khazana behad uska, keval nahi rahi santan.
(He had endless wealth and treasure, but only lacked a child.)
Laga manane Sai Nath ko, Baba mujh par daya karo.
(He began to plead with Sai Nath, "Baba, have mercy on me.")
Jhanjha se jhankrit naiya ko, tum hi meri paar karo.
(You alone guide my boat, which is caught in the storm, across.)
Kuldipak ke abhav mein, vyarth hai daulat ki maya.
(In the absence of a family torchbearer [child], the illusion of wealth is worthless.)
Aaj bhikhari ban kar Baba, sharan tumhari main aaya.
(Today, becoming a beggar, Baba, I have come to your shelter.)
De do mujhko putra daan, main rini rahunga jeevan bhar.
(Give me the gift of a son, and I will be indebted to you for life.)
Aur kisi ki aas na mujhko, sirf bharosa hai tum par.
(I have no other hope, I only trust in you.)
Anunay-vinay bahut ki usne, charnon mein dhar ke sheesh.
(He pleaded and begged much, placing his head at his feet.)
Tab prasann hokar Baba ne, diya bhakt ko yeh aashish.
(Then, becoming pleased, Baba gave the devotee this blessing.)
'Allah bhala karega tera', putra janm ho tere ghar.
("Allah will do you good," a son will be born in your house.)
Kripa hogi tum par uski, aur tere us balak par.
(His grace will be upon you and upon that child.)
Ab tak nahi kisi ne paya, Sai ki kripa ka paar.
(No one has ever found the end of Sai's grace.)
Putra ratna de Madrasi ko, dhanya kiya uska sansar.
(By giving a son to the Madrasi, he blessed his life.)

Tan-man se jo bhaje usi ka, jag mein hota hai uddhar.
(Whoever worships him with body and mind, is liberated in this world.)
Saanch ko aanch nahi hai koi, sada jhooth ki hoti haar.
(Truth has nothing to fear, falsehood is always defeated.)
Main hoon sada sahare uske, sada rahunga uska daas.
(I am always under his support, and I will always remain his servant.)
Sai jaisa Prabhu mila hai, itni hi kam hai kya aas.
(Is it not enough hope that I have found a Lord like Sai?)

faq.q1: What is the greatest benefit of reading the Sai Baba Chalisa?
faq.a1: Regular recitation helps build patience (Saburi) and faith (Shraddha) in the mind and provides mental peace to deal with life's hardships.
faq.q2: Should the Sai Baba Chalisa be read daily?
faq.a2: Yes, reciting it daily is considered very beneficial for devotees as it strengthens your connection and surrender to Baba.
faq.q3: Is there a special day to read it?
faq.a3: Reading it on Thursdays is considered most auspicious, but you can read it on any day of the week.
faq.a4: Yes, there is no discrimination in devotion to Sai Baba; anyone who has faith can read it.
faq.q5: Is fasting necessary while reading it?
faq.a5: No, fasting is not mandatory. Having a pure and sincere heart is all that is required.
